title: wedelia fructicosa
intro: Wedelia fructicosa, also known as Wedelia or Florida Beauty, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation, act as an antiseptic, and exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Wedelia fructicosa include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Wedelia fructicosa include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
